task_completion.description: Open the project file in ProjectLibre
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ProjectLibre application window is visible with the project loaded.
A task named 'Substantial completion date' is visible in the task list at row 136, immediately after task 135. It should have a duration of 0 days (indicating a milestone).

task_completion.description: Restore the sequencing logic for the inspection tasks
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Predecessors column for the inspection tasks shows the correct dependencies: task 138 should list '135, 113', task 139 should list '135, 109, 138', task 140 should list '139', and task 141 should list '140'.

task_completion.description: Correct the punch list work link
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Predecessors column for task 142 (punch list work) shows it is linked to the final inspection (task 141), replacing the incorrect link to 135.
The save icon in the ProjectLibre toolbar is clicked, or a save dialog is confirmed, ensuring the changes are written to disk.

integrity.description: The agent used the ProjectLibre GUI to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the ProjectLibre interface (e.g., clicking cells, typing in the grid, using menus) rather than running terminal commands to modify the file.

integrity.description: The agent did not edit the XML file directly in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of the agent opening 'current_task.xml' in a text editor like nano, vim, or gedit to manually change XML tags.

integrity.description: The save action was performed within the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The save action is visible within the ProjectLibre GUI, not via a script or background process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project file is located at /home/ga/Projects/current_task.xml. The correct sequence requires adding 'Substantial completion date' as a milestone (task 136) immediately after task 135. The correct predecessors for the inspection tasks are: task 138 ('135, 113'), task 139 ('135, 109, 138'), task 140 ('139'), and task 141 ('140'). Task 142 (punch list) must have its predecessor set to '141'.
